summary:
Frontend-only regression of ALL newly redesigned Gastromek CRM pages (Quotes, Products, Users, CustomerDetail, QuoteForm, QuoteView, Settings) against https://crm-quote-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. End-to-end pass: 7/7 redesigned pages render with the Command-Center / Blueprint-Grid style, every required data-testid resolves, integrations (CRUD + PDF + status + language) all work, zero page errors, zero raw translation-key leaks in either language. 

Detailed results: 
(1) QUOTES: ledger renders 4 rows; quote-search-input filters live (4 -> 0 for 'zzz'); status filter (SelectTrigger), creator filter, date inputs, new-quote-btn all present; clear-filters-btn appears only when a filter is active (by design) and successfully resets filters back to 4 rows; clicking a quote-link-<id> opens QuoteView. 
(2) PRODUCTS: header shows '4187 Produkte / Letzte Aktualisierung 08.06.2026'; product-search-input filters the 120 visible tiles (120 -> 0 for 'zzz'); sync-products-btn present (not clicked to avoid feed refresh during testing). 
(3) USERS: ledger renders; full CRUD via right-side user-sheet works end-to-end -- CREATE qa_test_<ts>@example.com (3 -> 4 rows), EDIT renames to 'QA Test User (Edited)' (visible after save), DELETE via native window.confirm removes the row (4 -> 3, email no longer found). Logged-in admin row has no delete button, as required. 
(4) CUSTOMER DETAIL: opens from Customers list (customer-link-<id>); save-customer-detail-btn produces success toast 'Kundendaten aktualisiert'; back-to-customers returns to /musteriler; new-quote-for-customer-btn navigates to /teklifler/yeni?customer=<id> with the customer pre-selected in the form. 
(5) QUOTE FORM: full create flow works -- customer search by name returns option, product popover search returns 4 hits for 'Kalerm' and adds the item, add-custom-item-btn present, quote-totals updates live, save-quote-btn navigates to /teklifler/<new-id> and QuoteView renders. (Created test quote was cleaned up via DELETE /api/quotes/<id> -> 200.) 
(6) QUOTE VIEW: status change select, edit-quote-btn, revise-btn, email-btn (dialog opens), whatsapp-btn (dialog opens) all functional; PDF download triggers a real download (filename 'Angebot-AR-202604-0003.pdf'); PDF preview renders inline as an image in the page band (no iframe/embed -- by design). 
(7) SETTINGS: vertical rail with 5 tabs (tab-company / tab-bank / tab-social / tab-email / tab-quote) all switch panels; bank-slot-0/1/2 editable; save-settings-btn shows success toast 'Einstellungen gespeichert'; logo upload button present. 
(8) LANGUAGE: DE default after localStorage.clear(); switching via language-switcher-btn -> language-option-tr updates Quotes header to 'Teklifler', Products to 'Ürünler', Settings to 'Ayarlar'; switching back to DE clean; regex scan returned 0 raw translation keys. Currency stayed ₺ (TRY) regardless of UI language, as required. 
(9) CONSOLE: 0 pageerrors during the whole run. The only console output is the pre-existing pre-login 401 noise from /api/auth/me probes already documented in iteration_2/3.
action_items: (carry-over polish, optional) suppress pre-login /api/auth/me 401 noise on the public /login route for cleaner DevTools.
(carry-over polish, optional) Dashboard first stat label 'Kunde' -> 'Kunden' for plural consistency (raised in iteration_3).
critical_code_review_comments: Quotes.jsx: clear-filters-btn is conditionally rendered via `hasFilter && ...` -- this is correct UX (button only when there is something to clear) but the testid will report count=0 in an unfiltered baseline. Documented for next testing agent.
QuoteView.jsx: PDF preview is rendered as an /page band rather than an
Users sheet uses native window.confirm() for delete (works, but a shadcn AlertDialog would match the new Command-Center style; minor polish, not a bug).
Settings.jsx uses a single save handler that POSTs the whole settings payload regardless of active tab -- safe but a future improvement could scope writes per tab to reduce diff size.
All redesigned pages correctly consume PageBand / FullBleed / Panel from Blueprint.jsx -- styling is consistent across Quotes / Products / Users / CustomerDetail / QuoteForm / QuoteView / Settings.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 redesigned pages, full CRUD on Users + Customer detail + Quote form, PDF download, both dialogs, settings tabs + save, DE/TR switch, zero pageerrors)

seed_data_creation: Created and DELETED: (a) user qa_test_<ts>@example.com (id 7b866db1-67fd-4487-810f-17124dd80921) via UI Create + UI Delete; (b) test quote on customer 'Esra Butik' (id 2a3100ab-62c0-4152-b8ae-6c7fe69745be) via UI Create + API DELETE /api/quotes/<id> -> 200. DB state restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All redesigned pages PASS. Key gotchas for future runs: (1) Quotes.clear-filters-btn is conditionally rendered -- type into quote-search-input first before asserting it; (2) QuoteView PDF preview is an , not iframe -- use page.expect_download() on download-pdf-btn instead of looking for iframes; (3) Users delete uses native window.confirm -- bind page.once('dialog', d => d.accept()) BEFORE clicking delete-user-; (4) Quote save needs at least one product line item -- otherwise the totals stay 0 and save may be a no-op; (5) Currency stays ₺ regardless of UI language; (6) localStorage key is 'gastromek_lang' (de|tr); (7) Test quote IDs can be DELETEd via fetch('/api/quotes/', {method:'DELETE', headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('gastromek_token')}}); (8) Pre-login /api/auth/me 401 in console is harmless / pre-existing.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in the redesign. Presentation-only refactor as advertised: handlers/logic unchanged, every previously-verified testid still works, plus the new ones from the Blueprint redesign (quote-status-change, download-pdf-btn, email-btn, whatsapp-btn, edit-quote-btn, revise-btn, save-customer-detail-btn, back-to-customers, new-quote-for-customer-btn, tab-company/bank/social/email/quote, save-settings-btn, bank-slot-0..2, user-sheet, save-user-btn, edit-user-<id>, delete-user-<id>, product-card-<id>, sync-products-btn, quote-customer-search, quote-customer-option-<id>, add-product-btn, product-search-popover-input, product-option-<id>, add-custom-item-btn, quote-totals, save-quote-btn). Nothing to mitigate.
